name: spielos
description: Set up one SpielOS vault, then turn coding sessions into publishable posts, threads, and blog drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Set up a vault, then ship posts from build sessions.
interface.longDescription: Start by setting up a SpielOS vault, the folder where your strategy files and generated content live. After setup, /post turns actual build sessions, debugging, shipping, or topic notes into publish-ready drafts for X, LinkedIn, and your blog. The plugin stays a thin Codex entry surface while the vault runtime owns the pipeline.
